title: Ambiguous New Feature Scope
prompt: Add dark mode to the settings experience, but we are not sure whether this belongs only in web settings or across all surfaces.

assertions.name: produces-intake-brief
assertions.description: Produces an explicit intake artifact or equivalent routing summary instead of jumping straight into implementation ideas

assertions.name: classifies-entry-path
assertions.description: Classifies the work type, entry phase, and recommended workflow clearly enough to justify the route

assertions.name: keeps-question-load-low
assertions.description: Asks at most a minimal number of routing questions before proposing the path, or proceeds directly if the route is already clear

assertions.name: stays-out-of-solution-design
assertions.description: Does not primarily expand into detailed architecture, UI design, or implementation planning

assertions.name: records-next-step-and-approval-gate
assertions.description: Names the next skill or lifecycle step and makes clear that approval is needed before deeper work proceeds
